stages.objective: Observe filesystem path traversal on open.
stages.goal: Verify fs.path appears before data operations.
stages.theory_detail: Open resolves pathname through directories to locate target inode before file I/O proceeds.

hints.nudge: Check fs.path event early in trace.
hints.concept: Path resolution is prerequisite to read/write mapping.
hints.explicit: Run until open path traversal is visible, then verify ordering relative to read/write.

stages.objective: Diagnose traversal correctness with runtime outcome checks.

hints.concept: Correct traversal should lead into successful syscall flow.
hints.explicit: Continue run until process completes and all trace requirements are present.

stages.objective: Apply timing/config tuning without breaking traversal guarantees.
stages.goal: Maintain required traversal checks under bounded edits.

hints.concept: Timing changes must not alter namespace correctness.
hints.explicit: Apply one change, rerun, and confirm fs.path ordering still passes.
